title: I Live for Love
writer: Jerry Wald, Julius J. Epstein, Robert Hardy Andrews
actors: Dolores del Rio, Everett Marshall, Guy Kibbee
plot: Donna (Del Rio) is a diva of the stage and wants her lover Rico (Alvarado) as her leading man. To keep this from happening, the producers (Churchill, Cavanaugh) grab Roger Kerry (Marshall) off the street and say he has a contract.
